title: Use side lane pressure to force a response and shift first
body: Side lane pressure is valuable because it forces someone to answer you and creates first move into the next play. You do not always need to all-in the side laner. Often the win comes from pinning the responder, crashing the wave, and moving first into an invade, objective, or skirmish.
actionables: When you enter side lane, decide whether your goal is to kill, pin, or simply force a response.
After forcing a response, look to shift first into the next map action instead of staying too long in side.
Review side lane sequences by checking whether you turned pressure into first move or only farmed one extra wave.

source.title: How to Win as a Mid Laner - Gameplay Guide
source.notes: Derived from the mid-game sequences where side lane pressure is used to pin Smolder and move first.
